channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "US, India Not Just Allies, We're Strategic Allies": Rubio To S Jaishankar
Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: "Have A Lot To Discuss, Work On," Marco Rubio Tells S Jaishankar

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: Buildings Shake, People Rush To Shelters As Ballistic Missile Pounds Kyiv

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian authorities and the US embassy had earlier warned of a possible significant attack.

item.description: A large ballistic missile attack pounded Kyiv early on Sunday, authorities said, wounding at least five people after Moscow threatened retaliation for...
item.content:encoded: A large ballistic missile attack pounded Kyiv early on Sunday, authorities said, wounding at least five people after Moscow threatened retaliation for...

item.title: Highlights: Trump Says Gunman Had "Violent History", Possible 'Obsession' With White House
item.description: White House Shooting live updates: Both individuals were said to be in critical condition, according to the official, who spoke on the condition of anonymity because they were not authorised to discuss the investigation.
item.content:encoded: White House Shooting live updates: Both individuals were said to be in critical condition, according to the official, who spoke on the condition of anonymity because they were not authorised to discuss the investigation.

item.title: 18 Suspected Ebola Patients Missing After Treatment Tent Set On Fire In Congo

media:content.media:description: The bodies of those who died of Ebola can be highly contagious and lead to further spread.

item.description: Another treatment center was burned down after family members were banned from retrieving the body of a local man suspected to have died of Ebola.
item.content:encoded: Another treatment center was burned down after family members were banned from retrieving the body of a local man suspected to have died of Ebola.

item.title: US Conducts Military Drill Over Venezuelan Capital Caracas

media:content.media:description: The drill included two MV-22B Osprey aircraft.

item.description: The U.S. military conducted a drill over the Venezuelan capital Caracas on Saturday, its first military exercise in the South American nation since U.S. troops attacked the
item.content:encoded: The U.S. military conducted a drill over the Venezuelan capital Caracas on Saturday, its first military exercise in the South American nation since U.S. troops attacked the

item.title: Waiting For Peace Deal, Britain Preps For A Mission To Clear Hormuz

media:content.media:description: With a crew of several hundred sailors, the RFA Lyme Bay will soon depart Gibraltar.

item.description: Britain's Armed Forces Minister Al Carns took a small group of reporters to visit the RFA Lyme Bay as it prepares for a possible international operation, led by the UK and France, to secure the strait.
item.content:encoded: Britain's Armed Forces Minister Al Carns took a small group of reporters to visit the RFA Lyme Bay as it prepares for a possible international operation, led by the UK and France, to secure the strait.

item.title: Russia Preparing Strike On Ukraine Using Hypersonic 'Oreshnik' Missile

media:content.media:description: Zelensky said that Kyiv counts on a response from the world.

item.description: Russia is preparing a strike against Ukraine using a hypersonic Oreshnik ballistic missile, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said on Saturday, citing intelligence from
item.content:encoded: Russia is preparing a strike against Ukraine using a hypersonic Oreshnik ballistic missile, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said on Saturday, citing intelligence from

item.title: "Deal Largely Negotiated": Trump Claims Hormuz To Reopen, Iran Responds

media:content.media:description: Iran, too, said they are working with the US to finalise MoU on ending the war.

item.description: Trump, in a post on Truth Social, also said that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as a part of the proposed understanding.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103475/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump, in a post on Truth Social, also said that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as a part of the proposed understanding.

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: Peace Deal To Be Announced "Shortly", Says Trump
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: "Avoid Travel To Congo, Uganda": India Issues Advisory Amid Ebola Outbreak

media:content.media:description: India has not reported any case of Ebola disease. (Representational)

item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has declared the situation to be a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC).
item.content:encoded: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has declared the situation to be a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC).

item.title: EasyJet Flight From Egypt To UK Diverted After Phone Charging In Checked Bag Sparks Safety Concern

media:content.media:description: A passenger told crew that her power bank was charging a phone in her suitcase.

item.description: Those onboard described initial anxiety as the plane changed course, fearing a bomb or serious mechanical issue.
item.content:encoded: Those onboard described initial anxiety as the plane changed course, fearing a bomb or serious mechanical issue.

item.title: US Lawmakers Slam Trump's Green Card Rule, Vow To Block 'Reckless' Move

media:content.media:description: The policy affects anyone in the US on a temporary, non-immigrant visa planning to apply for Green Card

item.description: Democratic lawmakers said they will pursue every avenue to fight against the "reprehensible decision" of the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) and push for its reversal.
item.content:encoded: Democratic lawmakers said they will pursue every avenue to fight against the "reprehensible decision" of the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) and push for its reversal.

item.title: White House Shooter Was Arrested In 2025, Believed He Was 'Jesus Christ'

media:content.media:description: The motive behind the attack is not clear yet.

item.description: Nasire Best was allegedly "mentally troubled" and was known to the US security officials for loitering around many entry posts.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103487/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Nasire Best was allegedly "mentally troubled" and was known to the US security officials for loitering around many entry posts.

item.title: US-Iran War Highlights: Trump Says US, Iran Are "Getting A Lot Closer" To Agreement: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: Video: Journalists Duck For Cover As Gunman Opens Fire Outside White House

media:content.media:description: Reporters shelter inside the White House press briefing room after the shooting.

item.description: Reporters took cover as shots were heard outside the White House, and were later rushed to the press briefing room.
item.content:encoded: Reporters took cover as shots were heard outside the White House, and were later rushed to the press briefing room.

item.title: Man, 21, Who Opened Fire Near White House Shot Dead, Bystander Injured

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump was at the White House at the time.

item.description: Shots Fired Near White House, FBI, Secret Service "On The Scene": Kash Patel
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103454/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Shots Fired Near White House, FBI, Secret Service "On The Scene": Kash Patel

item.title: 'US Not Honest, Iran Won't Compromise In Talks': Top Negotiator To Pak

media:content.media:description: The talks reportedly centred on a 14-point document proposed by Iran.

item.description: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Ghalibaf told Pakistani army chief Asim Munir during talks in Tehran that the US was not an honest party in negotiations.
item.content:encoded: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Ghalibaf told Pakistani army chief Asim Munir during talks in Tehran that the US was not an honest party in negotiations.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Deal Has "Solid 50/50" Chance, Warns Of Strikes If Talks Fail

media:content.media:description: The US president struck a less upbeat tone in another Saturday morning interview.

item.description: Trump also warned that if the US and Iran do not come to an agreement, "we're going to have a situation where no country will ever be hit as hard as they're about to be hit."
item.content:encoded: Trump also warned that if the US and Iran do not come to an agreement, "we're going to have a situation where no country will ever be hit as hard as they're about to be hit."

item.title: India Eyes $50 Billion Trade Goal As Piyush Goyal Set For Canada Visit

media:content.media:description: New Delhi and Ottawa have set an ambitious target of raising bilateral trade to USD 50 billion by 2030

item.description: Goyal will be accompanied by senior executives from more than 100 Indian companies representing sectors such as energy, metals and mining, aerospace, telecom, pharmaceuticals, agriculture, tourism, textiles, automotive, and capital goods.
item.content:encoded: Goyal will be accompanied by senior executives from more than 100 Indian companies representing sectors such as energy, metals and mining, aerospace, telecom, pharmaceuticals, agriculture, tourism, textiles, automotive, and capital goods.
